title: The Alliance Collides with Kaido’s Forces
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Ulti, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Luffy as The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
scene: The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That gave me goosebumps! Ulti- Sama's Headbutts are insane!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's like a cannon! She blasted a hole in the floor!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She must've smashed his head to pieces....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Page One-Sama!? Why did you two trans- form!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's 'cause this guy's the real deal. I acknowledge his skill!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No way! You definitely split that guy's head open! He's dead!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Then whose Haki am I sensing!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I think I under- estimated you.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've gotta get it together. I'm in an emperor's castle!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Raid on Onigashima Begins storyline with 19 dialogue beats. The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
